description_long: This tall, cylindrical obelisk rises from a broad, circular, tiered base that resembles a series of concentric steps made of brown stone or concrete. The shaft of the obelisk is segmented with visible horizontal bands and small circular details, giving it a columnar appearance. At the top, a domed structure is encircled by a dark ring, possibly representing a viewing platform or decorative band, and is crowned with a golden spire featuring ornate finials. The surface of the shaft is smooth and white, contrasting with the textured, earthy base. The overall design is reminiscent of monumental towers or minarets found in urban parks or plazas, serving as a landmark or commemorative structure. No visible windows or doors are present, and the object appears solid and immovable.
description: A tall, white cylindrical obelisk with a domed top and golden spire, standing on a wide, tiered brown base. The structure is detailed with horizontal bands and a dark ring near the top.
description_view_0: The obelisk is seen from the front, showing the entrance-like feature at the base and the full height of the shaft, with the golden spire clearly visible.
description_view_1: This view is similar to the front but slightly rotated, revealing more of the right side of the base and shaft, with the entrance feature still visible.
description_view_2: The obelisk is viewed from the back, with the entrance feature at the base not visible, and the shaft and spire remain prominent.
description_view_3: A rear-side view, showing the opposite side of the base and shaft, with no entrance feature visible and the golden spire atop the dome.
attribute_ornamentation: The tip features a golden spire with ornate finials, and the dome is encircled by a decorative dark ring. The shaft has horizontal bands and small circular details.
attribute_base_design: The base is a wide, circular, tiered platform with several concentric steps, made of brown stone or concrete, providing a sturdy and elevated foundation.
attribute_tip_design: The tip consists of a white dome topped with a golden, ornate spire and finials, giving it a distinguished and decorative finish.
